input.question: We are a student engineering team designing a vehicle for the FSAE competition. Attached is the FSAE rules document. What does rule IC.2.4.3 state exactly? Answer with only the text of the rule and no other words.

retrieved_context:
RULE: ic.2.4.3
            TITLE: the maximum restrictor diameters at any time during the competition are:

            CONTENT:
            rule IC.2.4.3: The maximum restrictor diameters at any time during the competition are:
IC.2.4.3 The maximum restrictor diameters at any time during the competition are:  
a. Gasoline fueled vehicles   20.0 mm 
b. E85 fueled vehicles   19.0 mm

final_answer: rule IC.2.4.3: The maximum restrictor diameters at any time during the competition are: IC.2.4.3 The maximum restrictor diameters at any time during the competition are: a. Gasoline fueled vehicles 20.0 mm b. E85 fueled vehicles 19.0 mm
